name: Holidu Vacation Rental Search and Distribution API
what_it_does: Holidu vacation rental search and distribution REST API for property managers, vacation rental platforms, and channel managers to distribute rental properties on Holidu's metasearch engine aggregating listings from Airbnb, Booking.com, Vrbo, and 300+ booking portals — enabling property feed distribution, availability synchronization, and booking referral through Holidu's European vacation rental metasearch platform covering 100+ countries. Enables AI agents to manage property listing for vacation rental catalog distribution automation, handle availability feed for calendar synchronization automation, access pricing data for dynamic rate distribution automation, retrieve booking referral for conversion tracking automation, manage property photo for visual content distribution automation, handle amenity data for searchable feature indexing automation, access geo-location for map-based listing automation, retrieve search ranking for visibility optimization automation, manage partner integration for channel management automation, and integrate Holidu with PMS, channel managers, and OTA systems for end-to-end vacation rental distribution automation.
use_cases: Distributing vacation rental property listings to Holidu metasearch for demand aggregation automation agents
Synchronizing availability calendars and pricing across Holidu distribution channel automation agents
Accessing Holidu search traffic and booking referral data for vacation rental analytics automation agents
Integrating Holidu with channel management platforms for multi-OTA vacation rental distribution automation agents
not_for: Direct booking engine for vacation rental websites (Holidu is metasearch, not a direct booking platform)
Long-term residential rental management (Holidu is short-stay vacation rental only)
Urban apartment rentals without minimum stay (Holidu focuses on leisure vacation destinations)
best_when: A vacation rental property manager, OTA, or channel management platform wanting AI agents to distribute vacation rental listings on Holidu's European metasearch engine and synchronize availability and pricing.
avoid_when: HOLIDU IS A METASEARCH, NOT A BOOKING PLATFORM: Holidu aggregates and redirects to partner booking platforms; automated direct booking management assumption creates wrong platform expectation; automated must treat Holidu as a distribution/metasearch channel, not a transaction platform. PROPERTY FEED FORMAT IS SPECIFIC: Holidu requires properties in specific feed format; automated generic listing data assumption creates feed format validation errors; automated must conform to Holidu's XML/JSON property feed specification. AVAILABILITY SYNC IS PULL-BASED: Holidu pulls availability from partner feeds on schedule; automated real-time push assumption creates non-real-time sync; automated must maintain up-to-date availability feed endpoint that Holidu can poll. PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED: Holidu distribution requires signed partner/affiliate agreement; automated open API assumption creates no direct access; automated must establish Holidu partner relationship before API integration.

auth.notes: Holidu uses API key for partner integration authentication. REST/XML feed API. Munich, Germany HQ. Founded 2014 by Johannes and Michael Siebers. Products: Vacation rental metasearch, partner distribution, price comparison, map search. SDKs: None public. 300+ booking portal aggregation. GDPR compliant. European focus, 100+ countries. Competes with HomeToGo for vacation rental metasearch.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Partner program; production requires partner agreement and feed setup
pricing.paid_tiers: Revenue-share / CPC model per booking referral; no fixed subscription fee
pricing.notes: Munich DE. GDPR. Partner agreement required. Revenue-share/CPC model. European metasearch focus.

performance.rate_limits: Feed crawl schedule (not real-time); partner API for updates; no webhooks

known_agent_gotchas: PARTNER AGREEMENT REQUIRED FIRST: Holidu API access requires signed partner agreement; automated open API access assumption creates no available endpoint; automated must establish Holidu partnership before integration development

HOLIDU PULLS FEED, NOT PUSH: Holidu crawls property availability feeds on schedule; automated real-time push synchronization assumption creates non-real-time distribution; automated must expose properly formatted availability feed endpoint that Holidu crawls

METASEARCH REDIRECTS TO BOOKING PARTNER: Holidu is metasearch — it redirects users to the booking platform (Airbnb, Vrbo, etc.); automated direct booking management via Holidu creates wrong platform expectation; automated must manage actual bookings on the originating booking platform

PROPERTY FEED FORMAT MUST MATCH SPEC: Holidu requires specific XML/JSON property feed format; automated generic listing format assumption creates feed_validation_error; automated must map property data to Holidu's required schema including mandatory fields

NO WEBHOOKS FOR BOOKING EVENTS: Holidu does not send webhooks for referral events; automated real-time booking notification assumption creates missing event signal; automated must rely on Holidu reporting portal for performance metrics
agent_readiness.security_notes: Vacation rental metasearch. GDPR. API key. EU/DE. Property and traveler search data.

security_score_components.security_notes: Vacation rental metasearch. GDPR. API key. EU. Property and travel search data.
